traits.description: Hover one Fated unit over another to form a pair and unlock a Fated Bonus. Your pair gains @PairHPBonus*100@% %i:scaleHealth%.(@MinUnits@) Pair gets the Fated Bonus. (@MinUnits@) All Fated champions get @BondIncreasePercent*100@% of the Fated Bonus (@MinUnits@) All Fated champions get @BondIncreasePercent*100@% of the Fated Bonus (@MinUnits@) All Fated champions gain @BondIncreasePercent*100@% of EVERY Fated Bonus

traits.name: Ghostly
traits.description: Upon dealing or taking damage @NumInstances@ times, Ghostly units send @NumSpectres@ spectres to haunt nearby enemies and heal @HealingPercent*100@% max Health every @TickRate@ seconds. Haunted enemies take bonus damage for each spectre on them, and pass spectres on death.(@MinUnits@) @DamagePercent*100@% per spectre

traits.name: Invoker
traits.description: Every @TickRate@ seconds, your units gain Mana.(@MinUnits@) @TeamMana@ %i:scaleMana% to all allies.(@MinUnits@) @InvokerMana@ %i:scaleMana% to Invokers; @TeamMana@ %i:scaleMana% to others.(@MinUnits@) @InvokerMana@ %i:scaleMana% to Invokers; @TeamMana@ %i:scaleMana% to others.

traits.name: Reaper
traits.description: (@MinUnits@) Reapers' Abilities can critically strike and they gain @CritChance*100@% Critical Strike Chance.(@MinUnits@) Additionally, Reapers bleed enemies for @BleedDamage*100@% bonus true damage over @Duration@ seconds.

traits.name: Storyweaver
traits.description: Storyweavers summon a Hero named Kayle and evolve her. Storyweavers gain max Health.(@MinUnits@) Pick a supportive effect. @Health@ %i:scaleHealth%(@MinUnits@) Pick a combat effect. @Health@ %i:scaleHealth%(@MinUnits@) Pick a combat effect. @Health@ %i:scaleHealth%(@MinUnits@) Ascend. @Health@ %i:scaleHealth%Each Storyweaver star level increases Kayle's Health and Ability Power. Kayle gets @BonusASPerStage*100@% Attack Speed for each game Stage.

traits.name: Umbral
traits.description: The moon illuminates hexes, Shielding units placed in them at the start of combat. Umbral units in illuminated hexes execute low Health enemies.(@MinUnits@) @ShieldAmount@ Shield; @DesireExecuteThreshhold@% Health execute(@MinUnits@) @ShieldAmount@ Shield; @DesireExecuteThreshhold@% Health execute. More hexes are illuminated (@MinUnits@) @ShieldAmount@ Shield; @DesireExecuteThreshhold@% Health execute. Illuminate the whole board(@MinUnits@) Executed enemies have a @DesireExecuteRewardPercent*100@% chance to drop loot; @DesireExecuteThreshhold@% Health execute

traits.name: Warden
traits.description: Wardens take less damage. For the first @Duration@ seconds of combat, they take an additional @StartOfCombatDRPercent@% less damage. (@MinUnits@) @DRPercent@% less damage

items.name: Spite
items.description: When this unit dies, reduce the Attack Damage and Ability Power of enemy units within 2-hexes by 25% for 15 seconds.Allies within the explosion range gain 40% Attack Damage and Ability Power for the same duration.​​[Support item]

items.name: Morellonomicon
items.description: Attacks and Abilities deal 1% Burn and 33% Wound to enemies for 10 seconds.[Unique - only 1 per champion]Burn: Deals a percent of the target's maximum Health as true damage every secondWound: Reduces healing received

items.name: Giant Slayer
items.description: Deal 25% more damage to enemies with more than 1750 maximum Health.

items.name: Titan's Resolve
items.description: Gain 2% Attack Damage and 1 Ability Power when attacking or taking damage, stacking up to 25 times.  At full stacks, gain 20 Armor and @BonusResistsAtStackCap@ Magic Resist.

items.name: Hand Of Justice
items.description: Gain 2 effects:15% Attack Damage and 15 Ability Power.15% Omnivamp.Each round, randomly double 1 of these effects.Omnivamp: heal for some of damage dealt

items.name: Sterak's Gage
items.description: Once per combat at 60% Health, gain 25% max Health and 35% Attack Damage.

items.name: Reaper Emblem
items.description: The holder gains the Reaper trait.[Unique - only 1 per champion.]

items.name: Crownguard
items.description: Combat start: Gain a 30% max Health Shield for 8 seconds.When the shield expires, gain 35 Ability Power.

items.name: Evenshroud
items.description: 30% Sunder enemies within 2 hexes. Gain 25 Armor and Magic Resist for the first 10 seconds of combat.Sunder: Reduce Armor

items.name: Ionic Spark
items.description: 30% Shred enemies within 2 hexes. When enemies cast an Ability, deal magic damage equal to 160% of their maximum Mana.Shred: Reduce Magic Resist

items.name: Hand Of Justice
items.description: Gain 2 effects:15% Attack Damage and 15 Ability Power.15% Omnivamp.Each round, randomly double 1 of these effects.Omnivamp: heal for some of damage dealt

items.description: Physical damage 30% Sunders the target for 3 seconds. This effect does not stack.[Unique - only 1 per champion]Sunder: Reduce Armor

items.name: Edge of Night
items.description: Once per combat: At 60% Health, briefly become untargetable and shed negative effects. Then, gain 15% bonus Attack Speed.[Unique - only 1 per champion]

items.name: Warmog's Armor
items.description: Gain 8% max health.

items.name: Guardbreaker

augments.name: Best Friends I
augments.description: Units isolated in pairs gain 12% Attack Speed and 12 Armor at the start of combat.

augments.name: Balanced Budget
augments.description: At the start of the next 4 rounds, gain 7 gold.

augments.name: Porcelain Crest
augments.description: Gain a Porcelain Emblem and an Amumu.

traits.name: Arcanist

traits.name: Artist
traits.description: The Artist paints the champion you place in a special bench slot. Get a 1-star copy of the champion placed there when the Artist's work is complete.Rounds to Complete = Unit Cost

traits.name: Exalted
traits.description: Your team gains @BaseDamageAmp@% bonus damage, plus more based on your level.After combat, store XP in a Soul Core. Sell the Core to claim the XP.(@MinUnits@) @DamageAmpPerLevel@% damage per level, @BaseAmountXP@ XP.(@MinUnits@) @DamageAmpPerLevel@% damage per level, @BaseAmountXP@ XP.(Current bonus: @TFTUnitProperty.trait:TFT11_Trait_Exalted_CurrentBonus@%). Each game a different set of units is Exalted.

traits.name: Fortune
traits.description: When you lose a player combat, gain Luck. The more fights in a row you lose, the more Luck you get.Lose Luck when you win. (@MinUnits@) Roll a die; in that many player combats, hold a Festival where you may convert your Luck into rewards.(@MinUnits@) Heal @Heal@ player health at the start of each player combat. @TFTUnitProperty.:TFT11_Trait_Fortune7Tooltip@Each Festival, roll a new die.
